properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 42/14
ANDOEYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT A NUMBER OF ROCKET FIRINGS FROM NORDMELA, ANDOEYA, IN THE
TIME PERIOD FROM 05 MAY TO 07 MAY 2014. THE ROCKET FIRINGS WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 19:00
AND 23:00 LOCAL TIME IN THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIOD.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC ARE REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA
DURING THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIODS:
A. 69-01,8 N 015-29,7 E
B. 69-03,5 N 014-32,0 E
C. 69-29,0 N 014-32,0 E
D. 69-29,0 N 015-45,5 E 
E. 69-11,6 N 015-49,6 E
F. 69-01,8 N 015-29,7 E
UPDATED INFORMATION REGARDING THE OPERATION WILL BE AVAILABLE AT OUR WEBSITE
WWW.ROCKETRANGE.NO
